## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of the problem.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Open a project with...
2. Set profile to...
3. Trigger review with...
4. See error

## Expected behavior

What should have happened.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages from:
- The VS Code notification area
- The Output panel (`View > Output > Revvy`)

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| VS Code version | |

| OS | |
| AI backend used | Copilot / OpenAI / Anthropic |

## Additional context

- Does the bug happen with the bundled profiles (`c-embedded`, `yocto`, `python`) or only your custom profile?
- Does it happen with all AI backends, or just one?
- Paste the relevant YAML profile section if applicable (remove any sensitive data).
